name: Sherried Turkey Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of Celery Soup (condensed), 10-3/4 oz.
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soup, milk, cheese, and sherry in a large skillet.
2. Cook over medium heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
3. Add rice, turkey, pepper, and pimientos.
4. Continue cooking until thoroughly heated.
5. Sprinkle with paprika before serving.
Substitute homemade white sauce or cream of chicken soup.
